markdown:
# Smith's Tools

- **Ability:** Strength
- **Utilize:** Pry open a door or container (DC 20)
- **Craft:** Any Melee weapon (except [[club]], [[greatclub]], [[quarterstaff]], and [[whip]]), Medium armor (except [[hide_armor|Hide]]), Heavy armor, [[ball_bearings]], [[bucket]], [[caltrops]], [[chain]], [[crowbar]], [[firearm_bullets_10|Firearm Bullets]], [[grappling_hook]], [[iron_pot]], [[iron_spikes]], [[sling_bullets_20|Sling Bullets]]
